prompts.title: Add a hero block
prompts.prompt: Add a hero block to the homepage with a large headline, subtext, and a CTA button.

prompts.title: Update Commerce URL
prompts.prompt: Update the Commerce URL for this project to point at the staging instance.

prompts.title: Inspect the block library
prompts.prompt: Show me what's in my block library and which blocks are unused.

prompts.title: Sync storefront changes
prompts.prompt: I've made block edits — sync them back to GitHub.

prompts.title: Customize a product card
prompts.prompt: Customize the product-card block to show stock status under the price.
